## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and website optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Traffic growth: 49% increase in clicks week-over-week, with dental hygienist-related content performing exceptionally well](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [New content focus: AI-related keywords (lower volume but growing) and insurance-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Conversion optimization: Implementing new conversion panels in articles and setting up HubSpot tracking](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Website improvements: Potential for optimizing the "Get Started" flow to boost conversions](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [Significant traffic growth: 49% increase in clicks week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Top-performing content: "What states can dental hygienists have their own practice?"](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [High-volume keywords centered around dental hygienist issues/pain points](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Lower-volume keywords related to dental office topics](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Exploring AI-related keywords (currently low volume, expected to grow)](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [New content assignments added to Airtable, focusing on lower-volume but relevant topics](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)

### Teero Product Update

  - [Developing a solution for pre-appointment insurance coverage estimation](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Aims to streamline process for both patients and dental offices](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Target launch: Summer 2023 (aiming for customers using it by then)](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Competitors exist, but many practices still use manual methods ("pen and paper group")](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)

### Conversion Optimization

  - [Implementing new conversion panels in articles (2-3 per article)](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Frank building custom conversion panels with headlines, descriptions, and CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Setting up HubSpot tracking to measure article-driven signups](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Nate to provide competitor list for keyword research and ranking strategy](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)

### Website Improvement Suggestions

  - [Kyle proposed adding a "Get Started" page to provide more context before form submission](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Potential for using modals for forms to improve conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [Suggestion to address friction in app store links and overall user flow](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Nate acknowledged the need for website updates, prioritizing based on impact](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nate to send list of competitors to Aida for keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Aida to conduct keyword research and content gap analysis focused on insurance-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [Set up HubSpot tracking for conversion measurement (Nate to coordinate with Frank/Christian)](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Nate to review and move unwanted content assignments to backlog in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Continue monitoring traffic growth and begin tracking conversions from content](https://fathom.video/share/W4w9kJ54Drk6zEqBuzw3fpYxVB2FEpzx?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
